attributes.gen_ai.operation.name: execute_tool
attributes.io.input:
{"description":"Explore project structure","prompt":"Explore the full project structure in /home/user/workspace. I need to understand:
1. What framework is being used (Next.js, etc.)
2. The full directory structure, especially `pages/`, `app/`, `components/`, etc.
3. Any configuration files (next.config.js, tsconfig.json, package.json, etc.)
4. All files inside the `pages/` directory and any existing `app/` directory

Be very thorough - list all files with their paths.","subagent_type":"Explore"}
attributes.io.output:
[{"type":"text","text":"Here is the complete project analysis.

---

## Project Overview

**Framework:** Next.js (canary version `16.2.0-canary.41`) with React 19.1.0  
**Language:** JavaScript (`.js` files using JSX), with TypeScript tooling configured  
**Pages Router:** Uses the classic `pages/` directory (no `app/` directory exists)  
**Styling:** Plain CSS via `styles/globals.css`  
**Data Source:** Fetches from `https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com` (JSONPlaceholder fake API)

---

## 1. Configuration Files

| File | Path | Purpose |
|------|------|---------|
| `package.json` | `/home/user/workspace/package.json` | Project manifest, scripts, dependencies |
| `tsconfig.json` | `/home/user/workspace/tsconfig.json` | TypeScript config (with `@/*` path alias mapping to `./*`) |
| `next.config.ts` | `/home/user/workspace/next.config.ts` | Next.js config (currently empty exports) |
| `.gitignore` | `/home/user/workspace/.gitignore` | Git ignore rules |

**Key dependencies:**
- `next` 16.2.0-canary.41
- `react` / `react-dom` 19.1.0
- `ai` 5.0.59 / `@ai-sdk/react` 2.0.0-beta.28 (AI SDK)
- `@modelcontextprotocol/sdk` ^1.17.0 (MCP SDK)
- `zod` ^4.0.10 (schema validation)
- `vitest` ^3.1.3 (testing, dev dependency)

**Scripts:**
- `dev` -- `next dev`
- `build` -- `next build`
- `start` -- `next start`

---

## 2. Directory Structure

There is **no `app/` directory**. The project uses the **Pages Router** exclusively.

```
/home/user/workspace/
  .git/
  .gitignore
  components/
    AppProvider.js
  next.config.ts
  node_modules/
  package-lock.json
  package.json
  pages/
    _app.js
    _document.js
    _error.js
    404.js
    index.js
    api/
      posts/
        index.js
        [id].js
    blog/
      index.js
      [id].js
  styles/
    globals.css
  tsconfig.json
```

---

## 3. Pages Directory -- All Files

### Special Next.js Pages (app shell)

- **`/home/user/workspace/pages/_app.js`** -- Custom App component. Wraps all pages with `AppProvider` context, a shared header (with nav links to `/` and `/blog`), and a footer. Imports global CSS.

- **`/home/user/workspace/pages/_document.js`** -- Custom Document. Sets `<Html lang="en">`, preconnects to Google Fonts, links Inter font.

- **`/home/user/workspace/pages/_error.js`** -- Error page. Handles both server and client errors, shows status code and message.

- **`/home/user/workspace/pages/404.js`** -- Custom 404 page. Shows "Page Not Found" with a button to navigate home.

### Route Pages

- **`/home/user/workspace/pages/index.js`** (`/`) -- Homepage. Uses `getServerSideProps` to SSR-fetch 5 posts from JSONPlaceholder. Displays them as a linked list with the timestamp and user agent.

- **`/home/user/workspace/pages/blog/index.js`** (`/blog`) -- Blog listing. Uses `getStaticProps` with ISR (`revalidate: 60`). Fetches all posts, renders them as a grid of cards with "Read More" buttons using `router.push`.

- **`/home/user/workspace/pages/blog/[id].js`** (`/blog/:id`) -- Individual blog post. Uses `getStaticPaths` (pre-generates first 10 posts with `fallback: 'blocking'`) and `getStaticProps` with ISR (`revalidate: 300`). Fetches both the post and its comments. Shows a back button (`router.back()`), post body, and comments list.

### API Routes

- **`/home/user/workspace/pages/api/posts/index.js`** (`/api/posts`) -- RESTful API for posts.
  - `GET` -- Returns a hardcoded array of 2 mock posts.
  - `POST` -- Creates a new post from `body.title` and `body.content`, returns 201.
  - Other methods return 405.

- **`/home/user/workspace/pages/api/posts/[id].js`** (`/api/posts/:id`) -- RESTful API for individual posts.
  - `GET` -- Returns a mock post object using the `id` param.
  - `PUT` -- "Updates" and returns the post.
  - `DELETE` -- Returns a success message.
  - Other methods return 405.

---

## 4. Components Directory

- **`/home/user/workspace/components…(+1062)
